passion & grit.

Owner-Operated
15 Years' Experience

Architectural concrete, crafted in the Wānaka and Central Otago region. Much like our environment, our craft is unique, raw, and made to last.

With an extensive background in landscape construction, concreting, building and earthworks, we bring a strong understanding of design, detail and craftsmanship to every project. Each piece has its own character — premium residential spaces deserve premium features and finishes.

Service Area

Wānaka & Central Otago

Focus

Premium Residential

Capabilities

WHAT WE MAKE

01

Fire Pits

Cast Concrete Features

Solid, sculptural fire pits cast to your dimensions — a warm anchor for cold Central Otago nights, and a feature that only looks better with age.
Bespoke & Hand-Finished
02

Outdoor Kitchens & Benchtops

Benchtops & Bar Tops

Burnished, hand-finished concrete benchtops and outdoor kitchen surfaces. Heat-tolerant, hard-wearing and unmistakably premium — built for real use and real weather.
Burnished Finish
03

Retaining Walls & Features

Walls, Furniture & More

Structural retaining walls, garden edging, bench seats, bespoke furniture, polished surfaces, stepping stones and custom letterboxes. If it can be formed, we'll build it.
Custom Formwork
